title: Physician Compensation: Understand the Formula Before You Evaluate the Offer

decision.problem: A headline salary can conceal the threshold, attribution, reconciliation, and downside that determine the economics.
decision.immediate_action: Request the complete written formula, all definitions, the expected-workload assumptions, and one worked example before comparing the offer.

know_do_share.know: A compensation number is not a compensation formula.
know_do_share.do: Translate the formula into one sentence, then test low, expected, and high activity scenarios.
know_do_share.share: Send the formula-request script to a physician who is reviewing an offer or compensation-plan change.

read_depths.30_seconds: The guarantee is only one component. Thresholds decide when extra work pays; attribution decides whether work counts; reconciliation exposes timing and repayment risk.
read_depths.2_minutes: Compare guarantee, productivity, attribution, adjustments, workload, and evidence/control. Two $300,000 guarantees can have sharply different economics when these terms differ.
read_depths.5_minutes: Run three activity scenarios, distinguish wRVU compensation from Medicare payment, audit attribution leakage, value non-cash economics, and identify legal, tax, benefits, or valuation review triggers.

decision_tree.question: Do you have the complete written formula and incorporated policies?
decision_tree.if_no: Request them before evaluating the offer.

decision_tree.question: Can you state the threshold, rate, attribution, timing, and downside in one sentence?
decision_tree.if_no: Request definitions and a worked example.

decision_tree.question: Do low, expected, and high scenarios match the workload and risk you would accept?
decision_tree.if_no: Clarify or negotiate the assumptions and terms.
decision_tree.if_yes: Identify any professional-review trigger before deciding.

downloads.name: Compensation review checklist
downloads.action: Use before the employer conversation and professional review.

downloads.name: Formula request script
downloads.action: Ask for definitions, a worked example, reconciliation timing, and repayment treatment in writing.

prohibited: sensitive free text in ordinary analytics
outcome_capture.privacy: Responses remain local unless a physician expressly opts into a future submitted response. Individual physician data is never sold.

enterprise_mapping.purpose: Identify aggregate decision friction in compensation-plan clarity without exposing individual physicians or employers.
enterprise_mapping.business_question: Which plan features and operational terms most often create physician uncertainty?
enterprise_mapping.minimum_aggregation: At least 30 validated anonymous outcome records across at least 5 organizations; no reportable cell below 10.
enterprise_mapping.validation: Document selection bias and self-report limitations; do not infer market rates or employer-specific conclusions.
enterprise_mapping.privacy: No raw offers, contracts, employer identifiers, individual profiles, or small-cell reporting.

references.title: Physician Fee Schedule
references.claim: Medicare PFS payment includes work, practice-expense, and malpractice RVU components adjusted for geography.

references.title: PFS Look-Up Tool Overview
references.claim: PFS information is updated through CMS payment materials.

references.title: Independent contractor (self-employed) or employee?
references.claim: Worker classification depends on facts and circumstances, not only the contract label.

seo.title: Physician Compensation Formula Checklist & Calculator | BOMSociety
seo.description: Compare physician compensation formulas—not just salary. Use a scenario calculator, decision tree, checklist, negotiation scripts, and source-backed questions.
